items.name: VK_MAP_PAL
items.doc: Maps virtual key names to their corresponding key codes for the PAL keyboard layout. Each tuple contains a key name string and its associated u16 key code.

items.name: parse_vk_pal
items.doc: Parses a virtual key code from a key name, looking it up in VK_MAP_PAL or treating a single character as its ASCII value.

items.name: parse_button_msgs_pal
items.doc: Returns Windows message IDs for button down and up events based on the button name, defaulting to left button if the name is not recognized.

items.name: parse_combo_vk_pal
items.signature: pub(crate) fn parse_combo_vk_pal(keys: &str) -> Result<(Vec<u16>, u16), AppError>
items.doc:
Parses a keyboard combo string (e.g., "Ctrl+Shift+A") into modifier keys and a final key.
Splits on '+' with the last component as the final key and preceding components as modifier keys.
Returns a tuple of (modifier virtual keys, final virtual key) or an error if any key is invalid.

items.name: post_combo_pal
items.signature: pub(crate) fn post_combo_pal(hwnd_val: HWND, mod_vks: &[u16], final_vk: u16)
items.doc: Simulates pressing a keyboard combination with modifiers by posting key down and key up messages to the target window in the correct sequence.
